[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010111 5
1 0100001 2
2 0001100 2
3 1101011 5
4 0000001 1
5 1100000 2
6 1000110 3
7 0100001 2

01 10 0101010 3
12 21 0000011 2
23 32 0000001 1 match 4
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0001000 1
56 65 0000001 1 match 4
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 1100000 2 match 5

02 20 1000110 3 match 6
13 31 0100001 2 match 1 7
24 42 0000100 1
35 53 0100001 2 match 1 7
46 64 0000000 a
57 75 1100000 2 match 5
60 06 0000000 a
71 17 0100000 1

03 30 0100000 1
14 41 0001000 1

36 63 0000001 1 match 4
47 74 0000000 a
50 05 1101010 4
61 16 0000001 1 match 4
72 27 1000000 1

15 51 0101011 4

37 73 0100000 1
